conservative.name: Panoply of Rhuin
conservative.requirements: 8 power. Must perform the prepare manoeuvre. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: As above, and add 2 recharge tokens to this card and/or to your Flaming Sword of Rhuin

boon.description: You may add or remove 2 recharge tokens from any of your recharging Bright Order spells

sigmarsComet.description: When you cast this spell, you may immediately and without paying its power cost cast Flaming Sword of Rhuin as well

reckless.name: Panoply of Rhuin
reckless.requirements: 8 power. Must perform the prepare manoeuvre. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

boon.description: If you suffer a critical wound while this spell is recharging, you may completely recharge this spell to convert this critical wound to a normal wound

bane.description: Each time you cast a spell, remove 1 recharge token from this card

sigmarsComet.description: When you cast this spell, you may immediately and without paying its power cost cast Flaming Sword of Rhuin as well
